  "findings": [
    "Service entrance conductors are undersized for the calculated load or service rating."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove the undersized service conductors and replace them with conductors of the correct size and ampacity."
  ],
  "rationale": "Under NEC Article 230, specifically 230.42, service-entrance conductors must have an ampacity not less than the maximum load to be served. Undersized conductors present a severe fire and safety hazard due to potential overheating under load.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Art. 230.42",
    "NEC Art. 310.15"
  ]
}
